characterTemplates.gangSkillRules: Brawl/Shoot/Might: 1d6 per 2 models (rounded up). Dodge/Cunning/Finesse: always 1d6.

level1.name: Agile
level1.description: Add +1 die to Dodge.

level1.name: Animal
level1.description: Add +1 die to two skills. Reduce Shoot to no-dice.

level1.name: Aquatic
level1.description: You automatically pass the perils for difficult and perilous areas in deep water. In the deep, your line-of-sight is up to 12" and you ignore the -1 fight penalties.

level1.name: Armored
level1.description: You cannot move over 6" except to rush. You roll one bonus die for all Health checks.

level1.name: Beast
level1.description: You cannot perform actions. Select two free abilities from: Animal, Aquatic, Big, Fierce, Mindless, Reanimated, Speedy, Swarm, Winged.

level1.name: Brainy
level1.description: Add +1 die to Dodge and Cunning. Reduce Brawl to no-dice.

level1.name: Brute
level1.description: Once per turn, you may re-roll one Brawl or Might die.

level1.name: Clever
level1.description: Add +1 die to Cunning.

level1.name: Covert
level1.description: When you are hidden, an opponent must win the opposed spotting check to spot you.

level1.name: Crafty
level1.description: Once per turn, you may re-roll one Dodge or Cunning die.

level1.name: Fierce
level1.description: Add +1 die to Brawl.

level1.name: Goon
level1.description: You cannot perform actions. Select two free abilities from: Aquatic, Brute, Fierce, Marksman, Sharp, Slam, Trick, Winged.

level1.name: Hard-Nosed
level1.description: Once per turn, you may re-roll one Might, Finesse, or Cunning die.

level1.name: Marksman
level1.description: Add +1 die to Shoot.

level1.name: Mighty
level1.description: Add +1 die to Might.

level1.name: Mindless
level1.description: Raise Brawl and Might one dice-type. Reduce Cunning and Finesse one dice-type. If a d6 skill is reduced it drops to no-dice.

level1.name: Monster
level1.description: You are horrific (see Horror).

level1.name: Mounted
level1.description: You may start each scenario riding a basic mount.

level1.name: Plan
level1.description: Once per turn, you may discard to gain a +1 bonus to Dodge or Cunning.

level1.name: Reanimated
level1.description: You automatically pass all 1d Health checks. Reduce Dodge to no-dice. You cannot block. You cannot move over 6" except to rush.

level1.name: Savvy
level1.description: Add +1 die to Finesse.

level1.name: Shadowy
level1.description: You gain a +1 bonus to all opposed spotting checks.

level1.name: Sharp
level1.description: Once per turn, you may re-roll one Shoot or Finesse die.

level1.name: Short Burst
level1.description: Action: Place the Short Burst (see Burst rules).

level1.name: Slam
level1.description: Once per turn, you may discard to gain a +1 bonus to Brawl or Might.

level1.name: Sly
level1.description: Add +1 die to Dodge and Finesse. Reduce Brawl to no-dice.

level1.name: Speedy
level1.description: You may move up to 16" instead of 12".

level1.name: Swarm
level1.description: You may play a peril from your Fortune hand on an enemy when they come into contact or activate in contact with you.

level1.name: Trick
level1.description: Once per turn, you may discard to gain a +1 bonus to Shoot or Finesse.

level1.name: True Believer
level1.description: (Followers, Allies, and Sidekicks only) Reduce Shoot to no-dice. When rolling for any other skill, you roll a number of dice equal to your character level. You ignore all modifiers except Fortune card effects. You can never have any other abilities.

level1.name: Two-Fisted
level1.description: Add +1 die to two skills. Reduce Shoot to no-dice.

level1.name: Winged
level1.description: You may fly up to 16" and ignore the intervening terrain and characters. You cannot fly and shoot during the same activation when you are at ground level.

level2.name: Big
level2.description: Raise Health and Might one dice-type. Reduce Dodge and Finesse one dice-type. Note, if a d6 skill is reduced then it drops to no-dice.

level2.name: Long Burst
level2.description: Action: Place the Long Burst (see Burst rules).

level2.name: Burst Fire
level2.description: Action: Place the 3" Burst (see Burst rules).

level2.name: Close Combat
level2.description: You cannot shoot over 12". Once per turn, you may discard to gain a +1 bonus to Brawl or Shoot.

level2.name: Daredevil
level2.description: Once per turn, you gain a +1 bonus for a peril challenge.

level2.name: Dithering
level2.description: Select two level 1 abilities at no additional cost. Your actions are impaired. Dithering is incompatible with abilities that prevent actions or reduce any skill to no-dice.

level2.name: Doc
level2.description: Action: Target one down colleague that is in contact with your base and roll your Cunning dice. If you roll at least one success (4+), the colleague may re-roll their next Recovery check.

level2.name: Drag
level2.description: You cannot shoot over 12". After a shootout, if you scored 2 or more hits then you may immediately move the enemy into contact with you. Do not resolve another fight in this activation.

level2.name: Eagle-Eyed
level2.description: Your close range goes up to 12", and long range is over 48".

level2.name: Faint of Heart
level2.description: Select two level 1 abilities at no additional cost. Your Recovery checks are impaired. Faint of Heart is incompatible with abilities that prevent actions or reduce any skill to no-dice.

level2.name: Harmless
level2.description: An enemy that is over 6" away cannot target, attack, or rush you. You can never target or attack an enemy. Reduce your Brawl and Shoot to no-dice.

level2.name: Hindrance
level2.description: Select two level 1 abilities at no additional cost. Select two of your skills to be hindered. Hindrance is incompatible with abilities that prevent actions or reduce any skill to no-dice.

level2.name: Insight
level2.description: Once per turn, after a challenge is revealed for this character, you may replace it with a challenge from your Fortune hand.

level2.name: Intrepid
level2.description: When you disengage, you may move 1" to 3".

level2.name: Impetuous
level2.description: Select two level 1 abilities at no additional cost. You cannot play any Fortune card effects during this character's activations. Impetuous is incompatible with abilities that prevent actions or reduce any skill to no-dice.

level2.name: Inventor
level2.description: During set-up, roll your Cunning. You equip one asset with a Gear cost equal or lower than the number of successes you roll.

level2.name: Noblesse
level2.description: You cannot be knocked out by failing a Recovery check. While you are down, an enemy in contact with you may knock you out as an action if they pass a random challenge.

level2.name: Relentless
level2.description: Once per turn, when you knock an enemy down or out during a brawl, you may immediately move up to 3" towards the closest enemy. If you rush a new enemy, do not resolve another fight during this activation.

level2.name: Shapeshifter
level2.description: When you take this ability create one alternate profile of the same character type. If the starting profile includes abilities that affect your roster or resources (Commander, Wealthy, and so on), the same abilities must be on the alternate profile. Action: You may transform into your alternate profile. Automatic: You may instantly transform into your alternate profile at the start of your activation if you are engaged. Note, if you are injured when you transform, your Health remains at the same dice-type.

level2.name: Shock
level2.description: Action: All lower level enemies within 12" must roll a 1d Health check. If failed, instead of being injured, you may immediately move the enemy 3" + X" away. If passed, they are not affected by Shock for the remainder of the scenario.

level2.name: Unearthly
level2.description: When an enemy fights you, they must substitute their Brawl and Shooting dice with their Cunning or Finesse dice (their choice). Otherwise, the fight is resolved as normal. You cannot shoot over 12". You cannot move over 6" except to rush.

level2.name: Unlucky
level2.description: Select two level 1 abilities at no additional cost. When an opponent plays a Fortune card effect during this character's activation, they draw 1 Fortune card. Unlucky is incompatible with abilities that prevent actions or reduce a skill to no-dice.

level3.name: Aid
level3.description: Once per turn, a colleague within 6" gains a +1 bonus for a challenge. The character cannot apply this bonus to themselves.

level3.name: Bodyguard
level3.description: (Sidekick only) Once per turn, when your Leader is attacked and you are within 3", you may immediately swap locations with the Leader. Resolve the attack against you — instead of the Leader.

level3.name: Brash
level3.description: You are not limited to rushing the nearest enemy.

level3.name: Captain
level3.description: During set-up, you gain +1 Gear point for selecting vehicles. This point may not be saved for other scenarios.

level3.name: Crackshot
level3.description: Your targets cannot roll cover saves.

level3.name: Dashing
level3.description: Your Shoot and Finesse dice-type are not affected by injuries.

level3.name: Deadeye
level3.description: You are not limited to shooting the nearest enemy.

level3.name: Deductive
level3.description: Action: Draw one Fortune card.

level3.name: Dread Gaze
level3.description: Action: Target one enemy anywhere on the table and roll an opposed Finesse check. If you win, the target cannot run or shoot this turn. Otherwise, there is no effect.

level3.name: Gadgeteer
level3.description: When you pass a gadget mishap challenge, the mishap is ignored and your gadget continues to function as normal.

level3.name: Gearhead
level3.description: During setup, you gain +1 Gear point for selecting gun modifications or vehicle modifications. This point cannot be saved for other scenarios.

level3.name: Indomitable
level3.description: You may re-roll one Recovery check per turn.

level3.name: Moxie
level3.description: You ignore the multiple fights penalty when rolling Brawl dice.

level3.name: Muscles of Steel
level3.description: Your Brawl and Might dice-type are not affected by injuries.

level3.name: Paralyzer
level3.description: Action: Target one enemy within 12" and line-of-sight, and roll an opposed Might check. If you win, the target cannot move (including disengage) this turn. Otherwise, there is no effect.

level3.name: Quick-Dodge
level3.description: Once per turn, shift your Dodge dice-type down to gain a +2 Dodge bonus.

level3.name: Quick-Shot
level3.description: Once per turn, shift your Shoot dice-type down to gain a +2 Shoot bonus against an enemy within close range.

level3.name: Quick-Strike
level3.description: Once per turn, shift your Brawl dice-type down to gain a +2 Brawl bonus.

level3.name: Quick-Witted
level3.description: Once per turn, shift your Might, Finesse or Cunning dice-type down to gain a +2 bonus to that skill.

level3.name: Reach
level3.description: You can use your Brawl skill to shoot (ranged attacks, shootouts, and so on). You cannot shoot over 3".

level3.name: Ruthless
level3.description: You may shoot into a brawl involving a friendly character. This is an unopposed attack, and all hits are randomly assigned to the engaged characters — so you may hit your friend.

level3.name: Savage
level3.description: Once per turn, after resolving a brawl, if you are still engaged then you may immediately start another brawl with the same enemy. Resolve the fight as normal.

level3.name: Shrewd
level3.description: Your Dodge and Cunning dice-type are not affected by injuries.

level3.name: Two-Guns
level3.description: Once per turn, after resolving a shootout, if the enemy did not go down or out then you may immediately start another shootout with the same enemy. Resolve the fight as normal.

level3.name: Veteran
level3.description: You ignore the multiple fights penalty when rolling Shoot dice.

level4.name: Blaggard
level4.description: If an enemy goes down in contact with you, that player must discard or the enemy is immediately knocked out.

level4.name: Cloak & Dagger
level4.description: Once per turn, after rolling an opposed spotting check, you may discard to gain +1 success. You cannot shoot over 12".

level4.name: Cloud Minds
level4.description: Action: you may hide even if you are currently in line-of-sight of an enemy.

level4.name: Commander
level4.description: Add +4 slots to your league roster to use for level 1 and level 2 characters only.

level4.name: Cursed Presence
level4.description: Action: Target one enemy to encounter a peril played directly from your Fortune hand. Line-of-sight is not required.

level4.name: Danger Sense
level4.description: You automatically pass the first peril you encounter each turn.

level4.name: Dark Presence
level4.description: Action: Place a 3" (dia.) area centered on you. This area is perilous and blocks line-of-sight for the remainder of the turn.

level4.name: Disarming
level4.description: When fighting you, lower level enemies must roll a Finesse check before choosing a skill to use in the fight. If they fail to roll at least one success then they can only Dodge.

level4.name: Drain Life
level4.description: Roll an immediate Recovery check if you clearly win a brawl.

level4.name: Extraordinary
level4.description: Raise a d8 skill to d10.

level4.name: Flying Tackle
level4.description: Once per turn, shift your Brawl dice-type down to give one engaged enemy a -1 penalty to all combat skills.

level4.name: Foul
level4.description: If you clearly win a fight (brawl or shootout) then the enemy cannot roll any Recovery checks this turn.

level4.name: Grappler
level4.description: When engaged with you, lower level enemies must roll a Might check before choosing a skill to use in the fight. If they fail to roll at least one success then they can only Dodge.

level4.name: Hardboiled
level4.description: When fighting you, enemies suffer a -1 Dodge penalty.

level4.name: Impervious
level4.description: When fighting you, enemies suffer a -1 Shoot penalty. Reduce Dodge one dice-type. Note, if your Dodge is reduced below d6, it drops to no-dice.

level4.name: Inhuman
level4.description: Raise a d10 skill to d12.

level4.name: Inspiring
level4.description: Once per turn, a colleague within 12" gains a +1 bonus for a challenge. The character cannot apply this bonus to themselves.

level4.name: Intimidating
level4.description: When fighting you, lower level enemies must roll a Cunning check before choosing a skill to use in the fight. If they fail to roll at least one success then they can only Dodge.

level4.name: Iron Will
level4.description: Action: Roll an immediate Recovery check.

level4.name: Lucky Devil
level4.description: Fortune card effects that are played "When an enemy activates", cannot be played when you activate.

level4.name: Loyal Following
level4.description: All temporary characters, including backup, minions, and so on, also benefit from your league perks.

level4.name: Master of Disguise
level4.description: You may start the scenario in hiding and may sneak up to 6" — instead of 3".

level4.name: Mindblast
level4.description: Action: All enemies within 12" must roll a Cunning check. Each enemy that fails to roll at least 1 success suffers a -1 penalty to all skills for the remainder of the turn and is immediately moved 3" + X" directly away.

level4.name: Nerves of Steel
level4.description: Once per turn, ignore a -1 penalty that is affecting you.

level4.name: Rally
level4.description: At the end of each turn, one friendly Gang within 12" of you may roll a 1d6 Recovery check if they are below full strength (models). If passed (4+), return one model to the Gang.

level4.name: Regenerate
level4.description: You roll 1d8 for all Recovery checks — instead of 1d6.

level4.name: Rugged
level4.description: If you fail a Health check during a brawl, you may re-roll 1 die.

level4.name: Scoundrel
level4.description: When an enemy goes down or out while in contact with you, you immediately take control of one random plot point they were holding. You now hold this plot point.

level4.name: Summon
level4.description: Full Action: You may summon X level 1 Minions. These Minions must be placed within 3" and are ready to activate this turn. Note, during set-up you must identify one type of minion to summon for this scenario and place the models near the table.

level4.name: Tactician
level4.description: When you deploy on the table, select one of the following Gang abilities: Armed, Dangerous, Disciplined, or Loyal. Your Gangs (except Mobs) count as having this additional ability while they are within 12" of you.

level4.name: Untouchable
level4.description: You always count as being in cover.

level4.name: Wealthy
level4.description: During set-up, you receive 1 resource point (Tips, Backup, Gear, or Contacts). This point may be spent on this scenario or saved.

epic.name: Blood Frenzy
epic.description: When you knock an enemy down or out in a brawl, you may immediately move up to 6" towards the nearest enemy. If you engage another enemy, do not fight again this activation.

epic.name: Concentrate
epic.description: Once per turn, gain a +2 bonus to one skill. Note, this bonus remains in effect for the remainder of this turn.

epic.name: Consume
epic.description: If an enemy fails a Health check while in contact with you, that player must discard or the enemy is immediately knocked out.

epic.name: Creeper
epic.description: Select two Epic abilities at no additional cost. You can never move over 3" in a turn.

epic.name: Dauntless
epic.description: Your skill dice (all skills) are not affected by injuries.

epic.name: Double-Dealing
epic.description: On your activation, if you are engaged, you may perform an action or full action before fighting the enemy. After the action is resolved, continue the fight as normal.

epic.name: Giant
epic.description: Raise your starting Health, Brawl, and Might up one dice-type (max d12). Reduce your Dodge and Finesse down one dice type. If a skill is reduced below d6, it drops to no-dice. You may be targeted by direct fire from guns.

epic.name: Immolate
epic.description: Action: Place a Heavy Burst (5" dia.). The center of this burst must be placed within 24" and in line-of-sight.

epic.name: Insidious
epic.description: All enemies within 3" of you have their Recovery checks impaired (see Conditions).

epic.name: Juggernaut
epic.description: Your move is never restricted by enemy characters or card effects. Even if you are engaged you may move as normal.

epic.name: Long Reach
epic.description: You can use your Brawl skill to shoot (ranged attacks, shootouts, and so on). You cannot shoot over 12".

epic.name: Mend
epic.description: When you pass a Recovery check, your Health improves by two dice-types — but cannot exceed your starting level.

epic.name: Mesmerize
epic.description: Full Action: Target one enemy within 12" and roll an opposed Cunning check. If you win, you control the target during their next activation. Note, you cannot have the character retreat.

epic.name: Monstrous
epic.description: Before you roll a Health check, the number of hits is reduced by 1. Your Dodge is reduced one dice-type. If a skill is reduced below d6, it drops to no-dice.

epic.name: Predator
epic.description: You begin each scenario in hiding and may sneak up to 12". You receive a +1 bonus to all opposed spotting rolls.

epic.name: Protection
epic.description: You automatically pass all perils and may move normally through all perilous areas.

epic.name: Rampage
epic.description: The area within 3" of your base is perilous for all enemies.

epic.name: Revive
epic.description: Once per turn, you may discard to automatically pass a Recovery check — instead of rolling.

epic.name: Unspeakable
epic.description: Lower level enemies suffer a -1 penalty to all skills when they are within 6".

gang.name: Armed
gang.description: This gang ignores the multiple fights penalty when rolling Shoot dice.

gang.name: Dangerous
gang.description: This gang ignores the multiple fights penalty when rolling Brawl dice.

gang.name: Disciplined
gang.description: This gang always counts as being in cover.

gang.name: Loyal
gang.description: This gang is not knocked out until it is down to one model.

gang.name: Mob
gang.description: This gang fills only one roster slot. Mobs roll 1d6 for all skills — including fighting. Mobs ignore all modifiers except for Fortune card effects.

gang.name: Sixth-Man
gang.description: This Gang includes 6 models — instead of 5.

perks.name: Dominion
perks.description: This perk grants access to the Minions, Gifts, and Cult assets. You cannot use your Resource points to select Backup, Contacts, or Gear assets.

perks.name: Altar
perks.description: During set-up roll 1d6. On a 4+ you may select two Level 1 Minions or one Level 2 Minion to join your league for this scenario.

perks.name: Amphibians
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Aquatic ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Base
perks.description: During set-up roll 1d6. On a 4+ you gain +1 Resource point (Backup, Contacts, or Gear) for an asset, vehicle, or mount. This point cannot be saved.

perks.name: Companions
perks.description: Each Ally on your league roster starts with one additional ability. This league roster can never include a Sidekick (level 3) character.

perks.name: Garage
perks.description: During set-up, your league receives +1 Gear point for a vehicle or modifications. This point cannot be saved.

perks.name: Jack of All Trades
perks.description: During set-up, you may spend one Tips, Contacts, Gear, or Backup point to select a level 1 ability for your Leader. This ability lasts for the duration of this scenario.

perks.name: Keen Senses
perks.description: Once per turn, you may give one of your characters a +1 bonus to dodge a peril.

perks.name: Long Range
perks.description: Characters in this league ignore the –1 penalty for long range. Characters in this league may re-roll 1 Shoot die during their activation if they do not move.

perks.name: Mastermind
perks.description: Your league roster does not include a Leader (Level 4) character. Instead, select a free (0 slot) Sidekick to fill the Leader role for scenarios. Additionally, your league receives 6 extra roster slots to select level 1 and level 2 characters only.

perks.name: On the Run
perks.description: At the end of set-up, all your unused Tips, Contacts, Gear, and Backup points are lost. Once per turn, after a challenge is revealed for one of your characters, you may replace it with a new challenge drawn from the deck.

perks.name: Reanimated
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Reanimated ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Resourceful
perks.description: Once per turn, as an action for one of your characters, you may discard and then draw 1 Fortune card.

perks.name: Short Range
perks.description: Characters in this league cannot shoot over 12". Characters in this league may re-roll one Brawl die during their own activation.

perks.name: Specialists
perks.description: Reduce three of your leader’s skills by one dice-type. All other colleagues raise one skill to the next higher dice-type. Note, your Leader cannot have any no-dice skills.

perks.name: Stable
perks.description: During set-up, your league receives +1 Gear point for a mount or mount abilities. This point cannot be saved.

perks.name: Well Armed
perks.description: Once per turn, before you roll Shoot or Brawl for one of your characters, you may cancel a –1 penalty.

perks.name: Workshop
perks.description: During set-up, your league receives +1 Gear point for a gun or modifications. This point cannot be saved.

perks.name: Ancient Sect
perks.description: Dominion required. During set-up, roll your Leader’s Finesse dice. Each success (4+) adds a +1 Contacts point for selecting Cult assets. These points cannot be saved.

perks.name: Animals
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Animal ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Bastion of Science
perks.description: During set-up, roll your Leader’s Cunning dice. Each success (4+) adds +1 Gear point for selecting assets. These points cannot be saved.

perks.name: Call to Arms
perks.description: During set-up, roll your Leader’s Might dice. Each success (4+) adds +1 Backup point for selecting level 1 or level 2 Backup characters. These points cannot be saved.

perks.name: Company of Heroes
perks.description: Your league may include a second Sidekick. In addition to the cost of this perk, this second Sidekick also requires 3 roster slots.

perks.name: Dark Pact
perks.description: Dominion required. During set-up, roll your Leader’s Cunning dice. Each success (4+) adds +1 Gear point for selecting Gifts assets. These points cannot be saved.

perks.name: Flyers
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Winged ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Greater Purpose
perks.description: Opponents do not become Director by clearly winning a fight against your level 1 and 2 characters.

perks.name: Nefarious
perks.description: Characters in your league may shoot into a brawl which includes a colleague. Shooting into a brawl is an unopposed attack and all hits are assigned randomly to the engaged characters.

perks.name: Network of Supporters
perks.description: During set-up, roll your Leader’s Finesse dice. Each success (4+) adds a +1 Contacts point for selecting assets. These points cannot be saved.

perks.name: Noblesse
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Noblesse ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Overlord
perks.description: Dominion required. During set-up, roll your Leader’s Might dice. Each success (4+) adds +1 Backup point for selecting level 1 and level 2 Minions. These points cannot be saved.

perks.name: Riders
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Mounted ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Shapeshifters
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Shapeshifters ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Skilled
perks.description: Characters in this league may re-roll one Might, Finesse, or Cunning die during their activation.

perks.name: Tenacious
perks.description: Once per turn, when an enemy activates within 6" of one of your injured (including down) characters, you may discard to roll an immediate Recovery check for that character.

perks.name: Daredevil Adventurers
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Daredevil ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Eagle-Eyed Troopers
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Eagle-Eyed ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Intrepid Explorers
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Intrepid ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Shadowy Agents
perks.description: One or more characters on this roster may include the Shadowy ability in addition to their starting abilities.

perks.name: Duo
perks.description: Your Sidekick starts with one additional ability and a Health of d10. Your league can only include one Leader, one Sidekick, perks, and Associates. This roster can never include any Level 1 or Level 2 characters. The cost of this perk does not include the Sidekick.

perks.name: League of Legends
perks.description: Your league includes four Sidekicks (included in the cost of this perk), but does not include a Leader level character. Instead, select one of these Sidekicks to fill the role of Leader for the scenarios.

associateAbilities.name: Exploit Weakness
associateAbilities.description: Once during this scenario, at the start of any turn, you may select one enemy’s ability. The selected ability has no effect for that character for the duration of the turn.

associateAbilities.name: Fortune's Favor
associateAbilities.description: Once per turn, when one of your characters encounters a challenge you may replace the challenge with one from your own hand.

associateAbilities.name: Infiltrate
associateAbilities.description: All your characters may begin the scenario hidden and may sneak up to 6" — instead of 3".

associateAbilities.name: Lucky Charm
associateAbilities.description: Your Leader gains Lucky Devil or Danger Sense (pick one).

associateAbilities.name: Misdirection
associateAbilities.description: One random enemy is delayed — does not deploy until turn #2.

associateAbilities.name: Phantom Hand
associateAbilities.description: At the end of each turn, you may discard. If you do so, each opponent must discard one random card.

associateAbilities.name: Research & Rumors
associateAbilities.description: Once per turn, you may discard to give one of your characters a +1 bonus for a challenge.

associateAbilities.name: Supplies
associateAbilities.description: Before the start of this scenario, you may select a level 1 ability for your Leader.

associateAbilities.name: Tinker
associateAbilities.description: You gain +2 Resource points to spend on a mount, vehicle, or Gadgets for this scenario. Note, these points cannot be saved for other scenarios.

associateAbilities.name: Trickery & Tactics
associateAbilities.description: You may draw one Fortune card each time your Leader passes a plot point.

associateAbilities.name: Twist of Fate
associateAbilities.description: At the start of any turn, instead of drawing as normal, you may discard any number of cards and then draw the same number of cards that you just discarded.

ranged.name: Pistol
ranged.description: You may re-roll one Shoot die during your own activation. Maximum range is 12".

ranged.name: SMG
ranged.description: Once per turn, discard to gain a +2 Shoot bonus against a target within 6". Maximum range is 18". Note, this bonus cannot be combined with another effect that has a +2 bonus.

ranged.name: Rifle
ranged.description: You ignore the –1 penalty for long range. You may re-roll one Shoot die during your activation if you do not move.

ranged.name: Shotgun
ranged.description: You receive an extra +1 Shoot bonus for a target within 6", and a –1 Shoot penalty for a target over 12". You cannot move over 6" and use this weapon in the same turn.

ranged.name: Primitive
ranged.description: You receive a light and basic melee weapon for free. You cannot move and use this weapon in the same turn. 18" maximum range.

ranged.name: Thrown
ranged.description: You receive a light and basic melee weapon for free. 12" maximum range.

melee.name: Light
melee.description: You may re-roll one Brawl die during your own activation. You cannot score more than 2 hits during a brawl — regardless of the number of successes you roll. Includes knives, claws, nightsticks, and so on.

melee.name: Basic
melee.description: Once per brawl, you may re-roll one Brawl die or force the enemy to re-roll one Brawl dice (your choice). You cannot use this weapon and shoot over 12" in the same turn. Includes one-handed swords, axes, and so on.

melee.name: Heavy
melee.description: Once per turn, discard to gain a +2 Brawl bonus. You cannot use this weapon and shoot in the same turn. Includes two-handed swords, greataxes, and so on.

melee.name: Long
melee.description: You receive a +1 Brawl bonus when you are ready. You cannot use this weapon and shoot in the same turn. May include polearms, spears, and so on.

melee.name: Grappling
melee.description: When you activate in contact with one enemy, you may force them to roll an opposed Brawl check — instead of resolving a normal brawl. The character that loses the check drops one Health level automatically. If there is no winner/loser then there is no effect.

melee.name: Shield
melee.description: Shield may be combined with using a light, basic, long, or thrown weapon in the same fight. When you fail a Health check in a brawl, you may re-roll one die. When you fail a Health check in a shootout against a primitive or thrown weapon, you may re-roll one die. Shield cannot be combined with any other Health check re-rolls.

perks.name: The First Cup
perks.description: You may draw one Fortune Card each time your Leader passes a Recovery check.

perks.name: The First Blade
perks.description: You may draw two Fortune Cards each time your Leader injures an enemy Leader.

perks.name: The First Coin
perks.description: You may draw two Fortune Cards each time your Leader passes a plot point challenge.

perks.name: The Exchange
perks.description: You may convert your Tips to any other resource point (Backup, Contacts, Gear) — at a 1 for 1 ratio.

perks.name: Ministry of Research
perks.description: You gain +1 Gear before each scenario. This point may be spent on the current scenario or saved.

perks.name: Ministry of Exploration
perks.description: You gain +1 Contacts before each scenario. This point may be spent on this scenario or saved.

perks.name: The Consortium
perks.description: Your league gains the Network of Supporters perk. You cannot select this option if you already have this perk or Ancient Sect.

perks.name: Archive of Artifacts
perks.description: Your league gains the Bastion of Science perk. You cannot select this option if you already have this perk or Dark Pact.

perks.name: The Faith
perks.description: Your league gains the Greater Purpose perk. You cannot select this option if you already have this perk.

perks.name: Mantle of Honour
perks.description: Raise your Leader’s Shoot and Finesse one dice-type (max. d12).

perks.name: Mantle of Discovery
perks.description: Raise your Leader’s Dodge and Cunning one dice-type (max. d12).

perks.name: Mantle of Protection
perks.description: Raise your Leader’s starting Health one dice-type (max. d12).

perks.name: The First Cup
perks.description: You may draw one Fortune Card each time your Leader passes a Recovery check.

perks.name: The First Blade
perks.description: You may draw two Fortune Cards each time your Leader injures an enemy Leader.

perks.name: The First Coin
perks.description: You may draw two Fortune Cards each time your Leader passes a plot point challenge.

perks.name: Fox Totem
perks.description: You may convert your Tips to any other resource point (Backup, Contacts, Gear) — at a 1 for 1 ratio.

perks.name: Coyote Totem
perks.description: You gain +1 Backup before each scenario. This point may be spent on this scenario or saved.

perks.name: Raven Totem
perks.description: You gain +1 Contacts before each scenario. This point may be spent on this scenario or saved.

perks.name: Ring of Fellowship
perks.description: Your league gains the Network of Supporters perk. You cannot select this option if you already have this perk or Ancient Sect.

perks.name: Ring of War
perks.description: Your league gains the Call to Arms perk. You cannot select this option if you already have this perk or Overlord.

perks.name: Ring of Fire
perks.description: Your league gains the Daredevil Adventurers perk. You cannot select this option if you already have this perk.

perks.name: Spirit of the Eagle
perks.description: Raise your Leader’s Shoot and Finesse one dice-type (max. d12).

perks.name: Spirit of the Wolf
perks.description: Raise your Leader’s Brawl and Might one dice-type (max. d12).

perks.name: Spirit of the Jaguar
perks.description: Raise your Leader’s starting Health one die-type (max. d12).

perks.name: The First Cup
perks.description: You may draw one Fortune Card each time your Leader passes a Recovery check.

perks.name: The First Blade
perks.description: You may draw two Fortune Cards each time your Leader injures an enemy Leader.

perks.name: The First Coin
perks.description: You may draw two Fortune Cards each time your Leader passes a plot point challenge.

perks.name: Meddle
perks.description: You may convert your Tips to any other resource point (Backup, Contacts, Gear) — at a 1 for 1 ratio.

perks.name: Master of Secrets
perks.description: You gain +1 Gear before each scenario. This point may be spent on this scenario or saved.

perks.name: Master of Minds
perks.description: You gain +1 Backup before each scenario. This point may be spent on this scenario or saved.

perks.name: Triumph of Will
perks.description: Your league gains the Overlord perk. You cannot select this option if you already have this perk or Call to Arms.

perks.name: Soul Pact
perks.description: Your league gains the Dark Pact perk. You cannot select this option if you already have this perk or Bastion of Science.

perks.name: Obscure by Clouds
perks.description: Your league gains the Shadowy Agents perk. You cannot select this option if you already have this perk.

perks.name: Saucer of Secrets
perks.description: Raise your Leader’s Dodge and Cunning one dice-type (max. d12).

perks.name: The Final Cut
perks.description: Raise your Leader’s Brawl and Might one dice-type (max. d12).

perks.name: Endless River
perks.description: Raise your Leader’s starting Health one dice-type (max. d12).

genres.name: Pulp Sci-Fi
genres.description: Science Fiction leapt from the pages of fantastic pulp stories about John Carter of Mars, Buck Rogers, and many more. Mutants, aliens, androids, and whatever you can imagine are easily created using the Pulp Alley rules. Some abilities, such as Cursed Presence may even represent psychic mind attacks. To further represent their technological and cultural differences, you may add +1d to one combat skill and +1d to one action skill.

modifiers.name: Tech
modifiers.description: During scenario set-up, each league receives X Gear points. These points may be spent to select assets for this scenario—but cannot be saved for other scenarios.

genres.name: Pulp Fantasy
genres.description: The Sword & Sorcery genre is populated with wizards, warriors, rogues, ferocious monsters, and legendary heroes. When you are creating your fantasy characters, some abilities may also represent magic spells. For example, Burst Fire could represent a fireball spell. To further differentiate the characters by class, culture, race, and so on, you may add +1d to one combat skill and +1d to one action skill.

modifiers.name: Primitive
modifiers.description: Shooting in this setting may represent thrown weapons and bows, as well as magical attacks such as ice-bolts, lighting, and so on. Characters cannot move over 6" and shoot in the same turn. All shooting over 12" suffers a –1 penalty, and you cannot shoot over 24".

genres.name: Pulp Westerns
genres.description: Westerns were a wildly popular pulp genre, with stories filled with natives, cowboys, lawmen, bandits, gunslingers, and soldiers riding across the vast, rugged frontier. All the characters of the Old West are easily created using the normal Pulp Alley rules. Each character may include the Pistol or Rifle (see Weapons) for free.

modifiers.name: Riding the Range
modifiers.description: All characters may begin each scenario on a free basic mount, unless otherwise prohibited by the special scenario rules.

modifiers.name: Gritty
modifiers.description: In this setting, all dice-types over d8 are shifted down to d8 (including Health). If a character would normally roll a dice over d8, it is automatically shifted down to d8.

genres.name: Pulp War
genres.description: Tales of battle-hardened legionnaires, Tommies in trenches, aerial aces, and all manner of gritty war stories thrilled pulp magazine readers. All the various characters of the War genre may be created using the normal rules. Each character may include the Pistol or Rifle (see Weapons) for free.

modifiers.name: Skirmish
modifiers.description: Scenarios in this setting only use 1 to 3 plot points. However, when you clearly win a fight against an enemy Leader or Sidekick, you take one random Reward card. Any reward earned in this way is no-drop. Note, the total number of rewards for a single scenario should not normally exceed 5.

modifiers.name: Harsh
modifiers.description: If a character is impaired by a Harrowing Escape roll, the condition is permanent.

genres.name: Pulp Lost World
genres.description: From the center of the Earth to lost Amazonian jungles and beyond, strange lands await intrepid explorers brave enough or unlucky enough to arrive. Characters of all types can be created with the Pulp Alley rules. You may use the rules for Epic characters to represent some of the greatest lost-world denizens. You may also consider adding a horror aspect to your lost world adventures by making some denizens horrific as well (see Horror rules).

modifiers.name: Denizens
modifiers.description: You may include the various inhabitants of a lost world by creating the appropriate character profiles and adding them to your scenarios with the NPC rules. These denizens will almost always be hostile towards all player-characters.

genres.name: Pulp Horror
genres.description: Many pulp magazines provided their readers with weird tales of terror and the macabre — from classic gothic monsters to the otherworldly Lovecraft mythos. See the Pulp Alley Horror rules for details. Each character may include one of the following kits for free.

modifiers.name: Horrific (kit)
modifiers.description: This character is horrific. See Horror rules. Instead of moving normally, if a horrific character is over 6" and out of line-of-sight of all enemies, they may Move in Shadows: Move the character to anywhere on the table that is also over 6" and out of line-of-sight of an enemy. This ends their activation.

modifiers.name: Investigator (kit)
modifiers.description: Once per turn, discard to gain a +2 bonus for one challenge. You cannot move over 6" and gain this bonus. You cannot shoot over 12".

reputationTable.name: Local Support
reputationTable.description: You may re-roll your Random Event once per scenario. As always, you must take the new result if you choose to re-roll.

reputationTable.name: Training
reputationTable.description: Your league earns +1 Experience. This point may be saved or used now.

reputationTable.name: Surplus
reputationTable.description: Your league earns +1 Resource point. Select one: Tips, Backup, Gear, or Contacts.

reputationTable.name: Regional Influence
reputationTable.description: Your league roster is expanded by +1 slot.

reputationTable.name: Secret Invitation
reputationTable.description: Pick a Secret Society to join and then select a Rank 1 perk from your Secret Society.

reputationTable.name: Underworld Contacts
reputationTable.description: Shift your dice-type up one when rolling for starting Director (d12 max).

reputationTable.name: Bolster
reputationTable.description: Your league earns +1 Experience. This point may be saved or used now.

reputationTable.name: Payoff
reputationTable.description: Your league earns +1 Resource point. Select one: Tips, Backup, Gear, or Contacts.

reputationTable.name: Accomplice
reputationTable.description: Your league roster gains +1 slot to use for an Associate only. Maximum number of Associates is increased to 3.

reputationTable.name: Secret Meeting
reputationTable.description: Select a Rank 2 perk from your Secret Society.

reputationTable.name: Privileged Access
reputationTable.description: On turn #1 of the scenario, you draw +1 Fortune card.

reputationTable.name: Advanced Training
reputationTable.description: Your league earns +1 Experience. This point may be saved or used now.

reputationTable.name: Fortuitous Discovery
reputationTable.description: Your league earns +1 Resource point. Select one: Tips, Backup, Gear, or Contacts.

reputationTable.name: Known Associate
reputationTable.description: Your league roster gains +1 slot to use for an Associate only. Maximum number of Associates is increased to 4.

reputationTable.name: Secret Agenda
reputationTable.description: Select a Rank 3 perk from your Secret Society.

reputationTable.name: Nationally Recognized
reputationTable.description: Shift the die-type up one for your Leader’s first Recovery check of each scenario (d12 max).

reputationTable.name: Guru
reputationTable.description: Your league earns +1 Experience. This point may be saved or used now.

reputationTable.name: Windfall
reputationTable.description: Your league earns +1 Resource point. Select one: Tips, Backup, Gear, or Contacts.

reputationTable.name: World Famous
reputationTable.description: Your league roster is expanded by +1 slot.

reputationTable.name: Secret War
reputationTable.description: Select a Rank 4 perk from your Secret Society.

reputationTable.name: Government Contacts
reputationTable.description: You gain +1 Tips before each scenario. This point may be saved or used for the upcoming scenario.

reputationTable.name: Legendary
reputationTable.description: Your league earns +1 Experience. This point may be saved or used now. You earn an extra +1 XP each time you gain an additional 25 Reputation points.
